calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Trish Abalos.
Ben Lunine, Esq. and Kristina Wertz, Esq. for Petitioner: Jonathan Carl Wagner, also present, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Joanna Claire Wagner, the Court further grants the petition for Change of Gender from Male to Female, and issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Decree signed in open court.
